title: Obrolan Cuaca Tingkat Lanjut
opening: Cuaca belakangan ini memang sulit ditebak, ya? Kadang terik menyengat, tiba-tiba sorenya hujan deras seperti dicurahkan dari langit.

t1.prompt: Cuaca belakangan ini memang sulit ditebak, ya? Kadang terik menyengat, tiba-tiba sorenya hujan deras seperti dicurahkan dari langit.
t1.promptTranslation: The weather lately has been so unpredictable, hasn't it? Sometimes it's scorching hot, then suddenly in the afternoon, it's pouring rain as if poured from the sky.

t2.prompt: Betul sekali. Sulit memang kalau sudah ada agenda tapi alam berkehendak lain. Memangnya ada agenda apa yang sampai terganggu?
t2.promptTranslation: Absolutely. It's truly difficult when you have plans, but nature has other ideas. So, what kind of agenda got disrupted?

t3.prompt: Menurut BMKG, sih, beberapa hari ke depan masih akan ada potensi hujan lebat di beberapa wilayah. Tapi, ya, ramalan cuaca ini kadang seperti tebak-tebakan berhadiah, sering meleset juga.
t3.promptTranslation: According to the BMKG (Meteorology, Climatology, and Geophysics Agency), there's still potential for heavy rain in several areas in the coming days. But, well, weather forecasts are sometimes like a guessing game with prizes; they often miss the mark.

t4.prompt: Mau bagaimana lagi, ya? Namanya juga hidup di negara tropis, musim hujan memang seperti sudah jadi 'langganan'. Kita saja yang harus pandai-pandai menyiasati.
t4.promptTranslation: What else can we do, right? Living in a tropical country, the rainy season is just 'a regular occurrence.' We're the ones who have to be clever in adapting.

t5.prompt: Ya, begitulah. Kadang memang kita harus pasrah pada kehendak alam. Mungkin ini saatnya mencari alternatif hiburan di dalam ruangan, atau sekadar menikmati secangkir kopi hangat sambil mendengarkan rintik hujan.
t5.promptTranslation: Yes, that's how it is. Sometimes we just have to surrender to the will of nature. Perhaps this is the time to find alternative indoor entertainment, or simply enjoy a warm cup of coffee while listening to the patter of rain.

t6.prompt: Betul. Perubahan iklim memang isu global yang patut jadi perhatian kita semua. Tapi untuk sekarang, mari nikmati saja dulu apa yang ada, sambil berharap cuaca membaik di hari esok.
t6.promptTranslation: That's right. Climate change is indeed a global issue that deserves everyone's attention. But for now, let's just enjoy what we have, while hoping for better weather tomorrow.

t-repeat.prompt: Maaf, bisa diulang? Saya kurang menangkap apa yang Anda sampaikan tadi.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, could you repeat that? I didn't quite catch what you said earlier.

t-end.prompt: Baiklah kalau begitu. Semoga hari Anda menyenangkan, terlepas dari cuaca di luar sana! Sampai jumpa lagi.
t-end.promptTranslation: Alright then. Hope you have a pleasant day, regardless of the weather outside! See you again.
